description: Letter from Ṣemah from Palermo, to Nahray b. Nissim, Alexandria. Around 1055. Mentions import of flax from Egypt to Palermo and exports of silk and lead from Sicily to Egypt. Also mentions the ship of Ibn al-Baʿbāʿ (r19 and v7), the qunbār of the amīr (v7) and the qārib of the vizier (v7). (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 4, #789)
tags: ships, Sicily, silk, markab al-sultan, flax, Nahray B. Nissim, Alexandria, Ibn al-Ba'ba'
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מפלרמו לאלכסנדריה. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
